Please test the following before contributing:

### Runs
* NeoForge Data Generation
* NeoForge Server Environment
* Neoforge Client Environment
* Fabric Data Generation
* Fabric Server Environment
* Fabric Client Environment
* All of the above in a separate project with a mod depending on registrytemplates

### Styling
* Any RegistryTemplate subclasses should include a Javadoc with an example for usage

### Releases
For new public releases:
* publish to Maven Central
* create a GitHub Release and Tag
